visual_description: A medium shot captures a woman with dark hair pulled back, wearing a brown leather jacket over a light-colored top. She stands in a dimly lit room, holding a white cordless phone to her ear with a concerned and serious expression. The background is softly out of focus, showing a wooden wall and a lamp with a patterned shade to the left, and a window with blinds and a vase of flowers to the right. Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, and a watermark is visible in the top right corner. The camera remains steady, focusing on her reaction. A woman speaks on the phone with an urgent and worried tone, her voice slightly high-pitched and rushed. She says, "你別管那麼多，快點回來" (Don't you mind so much, come back quickly). The woman's expression becomes more distressed as she continues her phone conversation. She gestures slightly with her free hand, which is not visible. The camera angle and setting remain the same, maintaining a close-up on her. New Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame. Her voice then becomes more intense and fearful as she continues, "阿孝要找人殺你呀" (Ah Xiu is looking for someone to kill you). The scene cuts
